dict.string: PowAI uses alarms to ring when your phone is locked and require a challenge before dismissing.
PowAI uses the camera to scan QR codes and barcodes for alarm dismissal missions.
PowAI uses selected food photos to estimate nutrition when camera capture is unavailable or when you choose a photo.
PowAI uses calendar access to show your Apple Calendar events inside your Day Plan.
PowAI uses calendar access to show your Apple Calendar events inside your Day Plan.
